text.hero-h1: Intelligence Applied to Real Problems.
text.hero-sub: Data Scientist and ML enthusiast based in Malaysia. I leverage high-performance resources and predictive modeling to build end-to-end solutions.
text.contact-text: I'm always open to interesting collaborations, idea sharing, or just a good conversation about technology and sustainability
text.contact-quote: The world doesn't reward potential, it rewards audacity

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website (Easy-Update)
projects.desc: A streamlined personal website hosted on GitHub designed for quick content updates. It uses an automated setup that pushes changes live instantly whenever a file is edited, removing the need for manual deployment or complex coding.

projects.title: Agribuddy (YSEALI Seeds for the Future 2025)
projects.desc: An AI-powered crop management platform designed to help Malaysian farmers optimize yields and adopt sustainable practices. The project combines a mobile application with data-driven tools and hands-on training to simplify digital transformation in local farming communities.

projects.title: Machine Learning for Sustainable Marine Resources
projects.desc: A research project developing a Sequential Hybrid regression framework to forecast fisheries stock trends. The model outperformed existing industry benchmarks in predictive accuracy, contributing to SDG 14 (Life Below Water) by providing a data-driven tool for marine risk assessment and sustainable resource management.

projects.title: FinScan: AI-Based Fish Disease Detection
projects.desc: A lightweight deep learning system designed for early disease identification in aquaculture. The project benchmarks 4 distinct CNN architectures, ultimately utilizing MobileNetV2 to provide real-time classification for 5 common fish diseases. This tool reduces reliance on manual inspection, enabling farmers to cut economic losses through instant, data-driven diagnostic feedback.

projects.title: Machine Learning for AgriBuddy: Pest Detection Interface
projects.desc: A machine learning tool designed to replace manual 10-minute farm data entry with a 5-second photo-based diagnostic. This AI system identifies paddy pests instantly and provides tailored agricultural advice. Currently in the validation phase with Jabatan Pertanian, the project bridges the gap between complex research and practical, on-the-ground tools for local farming communities.

projects.title: Food Bridge: Zero Hunger Solution
projects.desc: A Flutter-based mobile application developed to combat food waste and malnutrition by connecting restaurants and individuals with NGOs and food banks. The platform features a real-time inventory management system and a map-based interface, aligning with UN Sustainable Development Goal 2 to streamline the distribution of surplus food to communities in need.

projects.title: Interactive Web-Based Scavenger Hunt
projects.desc: A multiplayer learning platform built to increase student engagement through gamified quizzes and riddles. The system features a live leaderboard and a custom-built admin dashboard, co-developed using PHP and MySQL. This project was recognized for its innovation and functionality, earning a Top IT Project Excellence Award in UMS for its effective integration of interactive database management and user-centric design.

achievements.title: Invited Panelist Recognition (Jelajah IT Program)
achievements.desc: Recognized as one of 3 invited panelist for the Beyond the Hype: IT vs CS forum during the Jelajah IT community program. Selected to represent the Data Science cohort, contributing insights on academic pathways, industry relevance, and emerging trends in IT and Computer Science while engaging with students through an interactive discussion and Q&A session.

achievements.title: Grand Prize Winner for Idea Competition (IT For Community)
achievements.desc: Developed a specialized IoT device for the Kampung Kolopis community that functions without WiFi or mobile networks. The project outperformed international teams from UNDIP, Indonesia to become the #1 Grand Prize Winner after advancing through a competitive pool to the Top 5 Finalists, which was out of over 30 teams consisting more than 100+ students.

achievements.title: Gold Award at Selangor Techsphere Innovation Competition
achievements.desc: Agribuddy earned a Gold Award for developing a high-potential technical solution during the Techsphere competition. The project stood out for its unique execution and ability to solve real-world problems, beating out a wide field of innovators to take home a top-tier win.

achievements.title: Gold Award & Best Project Award at EIS
achievements.desc: Agribuddy has become a premier award-winning project recognized for innovation in Food Security and Agropreneurship at the 2025 Entrepreneurial & Innovation Student Competition. Out of a competitive field at the Sabah Festival of Ideas, this AI-driven platform earned both the Gold Award and the Best Project Award (The best award for the category) for its practical approach to empowering farmers with sustainable, data-backed insights.

achievements.title: YSEALI Seeds for the Future 2025 Grant Recipient
achievements.desc: A grant-funded project focused on regional development and social impact. Our project (Agribuddy) involved coordinating with multiple partners and volunteers to hit key milestones, ultimately delivering measurable outcomes for youth leaders and local beneficiaries within the community.

achievements.title: Best Pitching Team (TechTrek Innovators Pitch)
achievements.desc: A mobile application designed for flood risk mitigation and prevention, developed during an intensive 30-hour challenge at TARUMT. The project outcompeted multiple teams to win the "Best Pitching Award," recognized for its practical approach to disaster management and a high-impact presentation to a panel of industry sponsors.

achievements.title: The Most Innovative Idea
achievements.desc: A high-impact project that me and my team created that is recognized for its creative approach to regional challenges during the YSEALI Bootcamp. It focuses on practical, scalable solutions and earned the "Most Innovative Idea" title for its unique integration of technology and community-driven impact.

achievements.title: UMS Director's Award
achievements.desc: The highest academic honor awarded to the single top-ranking student in the Foundation in IT program at Universiti Malaysia Sabah. Out of the entire cohort, only 1 student receives this recognition for maintaining the #1 spot through exceptional performance and leadership.

achievements.title: UMS IT Project Excellence Award
achievements.desc: A top-tier recognition awarded for the highest-rated final semester project during the Foundation in IT program at Universiti Malaysia Sabah (UMS). This award is given to the project that demonstrates superior technical implementation, innovation, and overall execution among the graduating cohort.

achievements.title: UMS First Class Honors Award
achievements.desc: A prestigious recognition awarded for achieving a CGPA of 3.67 or higher at Universiti Malaysia Sabah. This honor is reserved for the top tier of graduates who consistently maintain elite academic standards throughout their degree program.

achievements.title: Monash High Achiever Award
achievements.desc: A merit-based recognition awarded for maintaining a 90% academic average during the Monash University Foundation Year (MUFY) at Sunway College. This honor reflects consistent high performance and a strong foundation in core academic disciplines.

achievements.title: Monash Award of Excellence
achievements.desc: A top-tier academic honor awarded for achieving the highest overall grade in a specific subject during the Monash University Foundation Year. This award recognizes the number one ranking student for their exceptional performance and subject mastery.
